name: SemanticSearch
description: Semantic code search: indexes workspace files and enables meaning-based search via embeddings (OpenAI/Ollama) with a TF-IDF fallback.

function.name: semantic_search
function.description: Search the workspace for code and files by meaning rather than exact keywords. Automatically builds the index on first use.

query.description: Natural language description of what you are looking for.

max_results.description: Maximum number of results to return (default: 5).

function.name: reindex_workspace
function.description: Force a full re-index of workspace files for semantic search. Run this after significant code changes.
